calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name for a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Michael Begert, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha , CSR: C. Yount #2737

Petitioner Bing Mei present in pro per as Guardian Ad Litem for the minor Yao Jian Mei and with Cantonese Interpreter Kathy Mei, were placed under oath and examined.
The Court granted the petitioner's request dispensing notice to other parent in open court.
Proof of Publication was filed.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Daniel Mei.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
